tools.name: startd8.agent.generate
tools.description:
Send prompts to any LLM provider through a unified async interface


Avoid:
- Never call provider APIs directly — use resolve_agent_spec() for consistency
- Don't assume response format differs by provider — GenerateResult normalizes all

prompt.description: The prompt to send to the LLM

tools.description: Multi-agent document review with structured analysis reports

tools.name: startd8.workflow.builtin.plain_language
tools.description: Simplify complex content into plain language

tools.description: Unified resilience with preset levels from OFF to AGGRESSIVE

tools.name: startd8.server.api

tools.name: startd8.deploy.coherence_check
tools.description:
Check whether a generated project is deployment-coherent (fail-closed). Returns {verdict: ok|soft|hard|skip, findings[], unbound_bindings}. A security-tier ERROR (e.g. deployed app not gateway-fronted) is HARD/non-overridable.

Avoid:
- Don't treat a missing/malformed verdict as pass — fail closed.

project_root.description: Path to the generated project (contains app.yaml / deploy/)

tools.name: startd8.codegen.generate_backend
tools.description: Deterministically ($0, no LLM) project one .prisma contract into a full all-Python app (Pydantic/SQLModel/FastAPI/HTMX). In deployed mode also emits settings/auth-seam/tenancy + the cloud-native deploy/ tree + per-env overlays.

tools.name: startd8.codegen.cloud_native_deploy
tools.description: Render the vendor-neutral cloud-native deploy/ tree (Kubernetes + Gateway API + External Secrets + infra-contract) and per-env kustomize overlays (dev/test/prod) for a deployed app. Operator values bound at deploy, never baked.

app_manifest.description: Path to app.yaml (deployment.mode: deployed + deploy: block)

tools.name: startd8.concierge.assess
tools.description: Onboarding-readiness assessment for a project: kickoff-input provenance + the $0 deterministic-cascade view (wraps wireframe). Read-only.

project_root.description: Path to the project to assess
